title: Planned maintenance on May 9th affecting integration developers
excerpt:
Our team will be doing scheduled maintenance on May 9th 2021 at 8am UTC (this sunday). The maintenance will last approximately one hour. 
During this time, developers will not be able to create or edit integration recipe…

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team will be doing scheduled maintenance on May 9th 2021 at 8am UTC (this sunday). The maintenance will last approximately one hour.

During this time, developers will not be able to create or edit integration recipes, custom actions, custom triggers or fields in their apps. Existing recipes will also be in read-only mode. The rest of the monday.com platform will work as expected during this time.

Update: you will also not be able to create new integration features during this time.

Please note that this maintenance only applies to the editors in the developers section. You will still be able to add integration recipes to your boards and edit them, and recipes will continue to trigger during this time.

Here’s a screenshot of the section that will be read-only during this time:

image2840×1508 280 KB

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this post!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: 4 posts were split to a new topic: Custom dropdown field only calls backend once

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Quick update – during this maintenance you won’t be able to create new integration features in your apps either.
